Warden,    I've been compiling reports from both Moon and Star Camps. Janthir is the worse of the two; the local kodan village was attacked, so Astrid has taken the necessary measures to provide them aid. Thus far, they seem to be cooperating with the Astral Ward. They're cautious, but she thinks that we can trust them right now. We will discuss further when things have calmed.    And, Frode... Please don't get yourself killed. I'd much prefer you in one piece.    Narcisse
Warmaster Gritblade has fallen! Revive him before the Pact retreats.

Warmaster,News of the death of mighty Forgal has been a blow to us all. I am deeply saddened to hear of it, and I know you must be suffering. But now, with Zhaitan on our shores and the city of Lion's Arch threatened, the Vigil is needed more than ever. We are regrouping at Fort Marriner, to lend our efforts to the city's immediate defense. Your orders are to rendezvous there and lead a contingent of soldiers into battle. The Vigil needs your courage; Tyria needs your knowledge of our enemy's weaknesses. Be strong.—General Almorra Soulkeeper

Wayfinder!My mind is still...reeling from the ordeal, but with your help and Mabon's, I'm on the right path again. Flickering images still cross my mind. Faces... A name.Enough of that. I'm writing because I wanted to give you something. Before she left, Waiting Sorrow gave me this to me. Dagda told me that you were helping her rebuild the Oracle Deck, so this should put you one step closer.Cheers,Lyhr

Wayfinder!Your aid in the fight against Eparch and his meat army has been an unexpected boon (if Dagda and I had made a bet, I'd be eating well tonight). In these moments of reprieve, I could use some help with an...odd task. A strange sensation pulls at my gut. Like a memory, waiting to surface.Come find me at the tower and warm your hands by the forge for a bit. I'll be much less cryptic once I've collected my thoughts.Lyhr
Wayfinder's Versatile Table recipe has been unlocked.

Wayfinder, hello.I am sorry to ask more of you, but if you've some time one of my reports from the Bastion of the Natural has passed along troubling news of missing Astral Ward. She could use your knowledge of the battlefield to locate them. If there's any chance of returning them to safety alive, we should move quickly.Her name is Hortensia, and she is likely working out of the refugee clinic in the Wizard's Tower.

Wayfinder, I hear you've gotten in touch with your animal side. Good, good. I've made my way to Moon Camp, and if you have the time, I could use your assistance with an experimental potion I'm developing. Come find me at the camp for the details.

Wayfinder, keep working on your battle magic. You will need it in the wars to come. Strength comes from the mind, after all.Speaking of, take this as a memento of your time here. I found it among the rubble during my rounds. You came to mind, in the most...uncanny way.Vanak

Wayfinder, my friend!Because of your aid, we are getting potions to the front lines at the Bastion of Strength. While I was cleaning up, I noticed an incredibly curious card in my cauldron. Surely it wasn't there before you departed, but I felt an incredible urge to send it to you right away. It doesn't look like much to me, but perhaps maybe you can make some use of it?Stay vibrant, darling.Z

Wayfinder,   If you're struggling to locate any clues of note, return to me at camp, and perhaps we can talk it over more together. I promise I will not retreat to the shadows like some frightened creature.
